raw_entries.text: Match ends, South Africa 0, Canada 1.
Second Half ends, South Africa 0, Canada 1.
Maxime Crépeau (Canada) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Mbekezeli Mbokazi (South Africa).
Offside, South Africa. Mbekezeli Mbokazi is caught offside.
Goal! South Africa 0, Canada 1. Stephen Eustaquio (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.
Derek Cornelius (Canada) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Iqraam Rayners (South Africa).
Foul by Richie Laryea (Canada).

Substitution, South Africa. Iqraam Rayners replaces Evidence Makgopa.
Substitution, South Africa. Tshepang Moremi replaces Thapelo Maseko.
Attempt missed. Oswin Appollis (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Yaya Sithole.
Foul by Jacob Shaffelburg (Canada).
Aubrey Modiba (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Jonathan David (Canada) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is saved in the top left corner by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Alphonso Davies.
Attempt missed. Promise David (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Jonathan David following a fast break.
Attempt missed. Thalente Mbatha (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Thapelo Maseko.

Niko Sigur (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Attempt missed. Luc De Fougerolles (Canada) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross following a corner.
Attempt saved. Tani Oluwaseyi (Canada) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Niko Sigur with a through ball.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by Mbekezeli Mbokazi.
Attempt missed. Oswin Appollis (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right.

First Half ends, South Africa 0, Canada 0.

Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.
Attempt blocked. Moïse Bombito (Canada) header from very close range is blocked. Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross.
